transcript.text:
[Why is she so shocked?]
[Oyster Mountain]
[Never 1 by 1]
[Pan-fried Oysters]
[Pan-fried oysters are true love...]
That's incredible
[Raw oysters as well!]
Should be around 200 total
[Get it on film!]
[We're having an oyster party today!]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Haengdang-dong today
Yellowtail and oysters are a must during the winter
I'm here to eat some steamed oysters
Oysters are just so fresh and tasty when in season
Let's head inside!

[Gool Gwa Jjim Sarang] [Seoul, Seongdong-gu]
There are a lot of customers here even at such an early hour
[Let's take a look at the menu]
A lot of oyster dishes here
[This is the real oyster party]
[Reading it with her body]
Let's start with 3 orders of Large Steamed Oysters
Pan-fried oysters too I have to get that
We're having an oyster party today
How many people share the Large-sized steamed oysters?
Around 3~4 people
Can I order 3 of that?
[That... much...?]
3 large steamed oysters and also the pan-fried oysters
[Can you eat it all?]
[Side dishes]

This many fresh raw oysters as a side dish
How can this be a complimentary dish?
It's like an actual order of raw oysters
Is it because I made a big order?
An order of raw oysters
Not fishy at all
[With some spiced radish]
That's lovely
Must dip it with chojang (chili sauce with vinegar)
They say that oysters are the ocean's milk
It's really like milk
I can't eat fishy oysters
These are perfect
This place is famous for their steamed oysters
It takes about 15~20 minutes
I'll finish this while we wait

[Just wait a little, pan-fried oysters coming right up!]
[With lots of oysters]
[Real pan-fried oysters]
[Being cooked to perfection]
[Complete~!]
Aren't these usually like this big?
Let's cut 1 in half
It's filled with oysters
They completely packed it
It's not 1 per piece They put a bunch in 1
Stuffed
Filled with oysters
The visuals...
Distinct taste of oysters
A little bit of the sea scent
The saltiness

[Sigh...]
Flavors
[Basically saying that it's tasty]
This is so good...
These are making the wait not bad at all
[3 large portions of steamed oysters]
[This over here is Mt. Oysters]
[The person who ordered the mountain]
That's so many
Thank you
[I have to get this on film]
[Turned into a scene of reporters]
[The 3 orders all together]
This is crazy
They're on the bottom too
They go under the table

Let's open it up
It's packed
Big and soft
Let's dip this in soy sauce
It just melts in my mouth Doesn't taste fishy at all
I'm going to use my hands or it'll take too long
With some chojang
[That girl eats that much food]
I'm so happy!
Unbelievable
Let's try it with ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
I might taste good together
Not bad
Good oysters taste good with anything
I'm going to gather them to eat at once
They open up easily

[How're they all so meaty?]
Let's make an oyster skewer
[I've seen this before...]
[Chopstick skewer professional... Ms. Tzu]
[Welcome... First time seeing oyster skewers?...]
Don't think I can do it at once
[What a liar]
So good...
The shells take most of the weight,
but it should be 10-15kgs total
So meaty, right?
So big
So meaty
These types of seasonal foods are the best
Webfoot octopus and female crabs for Spring
Jack mackerels are really good in the Summer

Gizzard shads for Fall
Flounder, oyster, and mackerel for Winter
[Happy]
You really have to dine in for these
For steamed oysters
Stick the knife in the gap
Twist it vertically
[And crack it open]
The meat is bigger than the shell
[How many are you eating in 1 bite...?]
Open sesame!
Open!
Open sesame
There
Sweet!
A misconception that closed ones are not as good

But a lot of them are surprisingly meaty and tasty
Take this for dessert
We had a birthday party
Thank you...
I received a piece of cake Thank you~
Looks yummy
[Pretty sure he said "dessert"...]
[Thank you!]
I don't think these will fill me up
[What is that non-sense...?]
I've been eating the ones on my side
It's literally bottomless I can't see the bottom
This is a big one
So tasty...
These are different from clams
A similar smell for sure

But more flavor
Opening it takes so long compared to eating it
-Can I please get a photo with you? -Yes, of course
[Today's birthday boy~]
[Happy Birthday to You!]
Cabbage leaf for oysters
[Are you supposed to put that many...?]
Spiced radish too
You don't want cold oysters on a cold day
So I think steamed oysters are better for the winter
A smaller oyster on top of an oyster!
So cute
[Right into her mouth...?]
[Open up a bunch...]
[And eat a bunch...]
[The mountain is getting smaller!]

Break!
There's a special method for this
Pound it
Now it's looking like 1 large-size
What is this thing in the middle?
I wonder...
They said there are boiled eggs
Didn't know they were in here
3 boiled eggs come with 1 large-size order
So I'm supposed to get 9, but...
I asked them for just 3 boiled eggs
Now it seems like 1 large order
About 1 and a half
So I ate about half so far
There were 2 people that almost ate 2 large orders before
They didn't eat anything else

No drinks
No talking
Not even pan-fried oysters
This will be a record if she eats it all
First time in 15 years!
Seems like she can easily do it
[Yes, definitely possible]
Look how meaty that is
I'm craving something sweet now
[Cake while eating oysters...?]
This truly is a sweet-salty meal
Oh no!
[Deeply pissed off]
My chocolate...
Nvm, I can't eat it
[You were going to eat it...?]

Thank you so much for the cake
So good
[Back to oysters!]
[Mt. Oyster has collapsed!]
[In goes the oysters]
What?
Look at this It's a crab
[Another cutie]
Can I eat this? I shouldn't, right?
[She's so scary...!]
You're so pretty!
Thank you
[For some cake again]
Oyster and cake combination is pretty good
Excuse me, How many oysters are there in 1 large order?
Around 55 to 60 oysters

So about 200 total
[Surprised after eating it all?]
Should be around 200 including the raw oysters
A good amount in pan-fried oysters too
I came here really early
There are so many customers here already at such an early hour maybe because oysters are in season
I apologize for the noise/audio
Let's finish it up and head out
[Speed it up!]
I've opened it all
[How about us...?]
Oh right, the eggs Oh, another 1 here
Thankfully it opens easily
What is this?
Really?
You bought this for me?

Thank you!
Last plate of oysters
[Mt. Oysters cleared!]
You really finished it all
It was so delicious
A lot of people can't finish too much of it because of the same repetitive taste
So this is truly impressive
I don't feel like eating boiled eggs right now So I'll take them to-go
[But why in the gloves...?]
[Finishing up the cake too]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
